allow: PowerShell(docker exec hukudok-postgres psql -U hukudok_user -d hukudok_prod -f /tmp/prod_backup.sql 2>&1)
PowerShell(docker exec hukudok-postgres psql -U hukudok_user -d hukudok_staging -c "SELECT table_name FROM information_schema.tables WHERE table_schema = 'public' ORDER BY table_name;")
PowerShell(docker exec hukudok-postgres psql -U hukudok_user -d hukudok -c "SELECT table_name FROM information_schema.tables WHERE table_schema = 'public' ORDER BY table_name;")
PowerShell(docker exec hukudok-postgres psql -U hukudok_user -d hukudok -c "SELECT tracking_no, klasor_no_2, esas_no, hasar_dosya_no, hukuk_no FROM cases WHERE klasor_no_2 IS NOT NULL LIMIT 10;")
PowerShell(docker exec hukudok-postgres psql -U hukudok_user -d hukudok_staging -c "SELECT tracking_no, esas_no FROM cases WHERE tracking_no LIKE 'S3.AXA%' LIMIT 10;")
